appliedUpdates.description: Fixed 3 parity bugs found during review: (1) CreateLocationMap always includes $143 in entries matching Python, (2) haveContent merge returns after successful merge to prevent duplicate chunks, (3) merge condition simplified to check ImageResource=="" matching Python's None check

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add note about FragmentStore vs fragmentCatalog pattern — FragmentStore is used for position/location operations and stores raw maps, while fragmentCatalog is the primary fragment management structure. Workers should use FragmentStore for new position/location features.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: m2-position-location-stubs review noted FragmentStore is undocumented but used throughout new code.

rejectedObservations.observation: PageTemplateValues doesn't hold full template data due to filterBodyStyleValues stripping $159/$156
rejectedObservations.reason: Pre-existing architectural concern noted in m1-foundation review. Not introduced by m2 features and tracked as known limitation.

rejectedObservations.observation: Worker followed go-port-worker skill procedure correctly
rejectedObservations.reason: Expected behavior, not an actionable observation

nonBlockingIssues.description: Python's check_empty diagnostic not ported; magazine $325/$323 uses result structs instead of immediate book_part mutation; PageTemplateValues doesn't hold full template data in production
haveContent merge does not concatenate text from merged chunks; CheckPositionAndLocationMaps missing section_lengths validation; allow_zero parameter not handled
$550 fragment key validation not as strict as Python (doesn't check for extra keys in entries)
